description: Change-request applied-live email after the customer approved a preview and the promote workflow succeeded

values.originalMessage: Please change my tagline to 'Award-winning gardens in Oxfordshire'

expected.subject: Your change is live ✓
expected.body:
Hi Lucas,

Approved + live. Your site now reflects:

  Please change my tagline to 'Award-winning gardens in Oxfordshire'

Take a look: https://test09052026moduforge.store/

If anything's not quite right, hit reply on this email or open
your dashboard and submit a follow-up. Same change-request
allowance applies.

— Ben (via Cowork)

P.S. — If you spot any issue in the next hour or so, your
previous version is still in Cloudflare's history; let me know
and I can roll back instantly.
